title: Stargate Journey: MoreGates Addon
description: Adds more stargate variants to Stargate Journey
body:
This addon adds 30+ custom Stargate variants to the mod Stargate Journey. All recipes for the variant crystals can be found using JEI.

This mod requires Stargate Journey to function. [Download here](https://modrinth.com/mod/sgjourney)

Some of the added stargates include:

- Andromeda (P)
- Bloodgate (MW)
- Crafter (MW)
- Create (U) (Requires Create)
- Create MW (MW) (Requires Create)
- Dark Ascension (P)
- Doom (T)
- End (MW)
- Industrial (MW) (Requires Create)
- Jumpgate (MW) (Requires Ad Astra)
- Makeshift (T)
- Nether (U)
- Ori (MW)
- Quantum (P) (Requires Mekanism)
- Retrogate (P) (Requires AE2)
- Silence (MW) (Requires Deeper And Darker)
- Spatial (P) (Requires AE2)
- Streamline (P) (Requires Ad Astra)
- Warpgate (P)
